question: Which statement best describes the average unemployment rate for Australia (A) compared with China (D)?

options.A: Australia (A) had the lowest unemployment rate.
options.B: Australia (A) had a lower unemployment rate than China (D).
options.C: Australia (A) had a higher unemployment rate than China (D).
options.D: Australia (A) has no reported unemployment data on this map.

explanation: Canada and China both have measured data, so we can compare them numerically. Canada is 13.5% vs 12.1% for China.
